meaning: n.[鑽痌鍘荤敳鑲句笂鑵虹礌
examples: Lack of vitamin c, which affects noradrenaline levels, can make you crabby!
For instance, their heart rate shoots up more dramatically when stimulated by noradrenaline.
Another treatment is intended to prevent brain cells from responding to noradrenaline and serotonin, brain chemicals linked to addiction.
Hange-koboku-to, a Kampo medicine, modulates cerebral levels of 5-HT (5-hydroxytryptamine), NA (noradrenaline) and DA (dopamine) in mice.
